name: First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc.
business: First Watch Restaurant Group, Inc. operates and franchises restaurants under the First Watch trade name, serving made-to-order breakfast, brunch and lunch using fresh ingredients in a daytime-only operating model. As of December 28, 2025, the company had 560 company-owned and 73 franchise-owned restaurants across 32 states in the United States. The company sells to consumers dining in-restaurant and via off-premises channels including takeout and third-party delivery.

exposures.sentence: Since opening our doors in 1983, we have been a pioneer in Daytime Dining, serving made-to-order breakfast, brunch and lunch using the freshest of ingredients.
In 2025 and 2024, our total off-premises sales accounted for 19.0% and 17.5%, respectively, of our total restaurant sales.
In February 2024, we completed the roll-out of pay-at-the-table technology at all company-owned restaurants.
By integrating remote waitlist, remote orders, tokenized credit card transactions and WiFi into one system, we now have the ability to better understand trial and frequency.
our inability or failure to recognize, respond to and effectively manage the accelerated impact of social media and artificial intelligence
our inability or failure to recognize, respond to and effectively manage the accelerated impact of social media and artificial intelligence

catalysts.event: Open 53 to 55 company-owned restaurants and 9 to 11 franchise-owned restaurants in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to open between 53 to 55 company-owned restaurants and 9 to 11 franchise-owned restaurants during 2026.

catalysts.event: Close three company-owned restaurants in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We also plan to close three company-owned restaurants, resulting in a total of 59 to 63 net new system-wide restaurants in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: First Watch has the potential for more than 2,200 restaurants in the continental United States.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe First Watch has the potential for more than 2,200 restaurants in the continental United States.
